findings.description: The knowledge file states: '`Initializable`はNablarch固有のライフサイクルインタフェースであり、DIコンテナが起動時に`initialize()`メソッドを自動的に呼び出す。' Neither of these claims (Nablarch-specific lifecycle interface, DI container auto-calling initialize() at startup) appears anywhere in the source file. The source only shows `implements RSAKeyProvider, Initializable` with an `@Override initialize()` method and a code comment describing what it does.
findings.source_evidence: Source shows: `public class CognitoRSAKeyProvider implements RSAKeyProvider, Initializable { ... @Override public void initialize() { // Cognitoが公開しているJWKSエンドポイントから公開鍵を取得するためのプロバイダを作成する。 ... }` — no explanation of what Initializable is or how it is invoked.

findings.description: PascalCase class names `Jwk` and `JwkException` appear in the source code for CognitoRSAKeyProvider (getPublicKeyById method) but are absent from hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `Jwk jwk = provider.get(keyId); return (RSAPublicKey) jwk.getPublicKey(); } catch (JwkException e) { return null; }`

findings.location: s6 — 認証および成功時のログイン状態設定
findings.description: PascalCase class name `SystemRepository` appears directly in the code example in s6 but is absent from hints.
